name: pinnip
description: Entry to the "Global Game Jam 2026"--An aim game with a twist!

name: Cell Growth Simulator
description: Heavily inspired by Conway’s Game of Life---The Cell Growth Simulator is a web app that simulates bacterial growth on a grid based canvas.

name: Analysis of Global Terrorism
description: An EDA using a subset of the Global Terrorism Database to identify patterns in 2021 global conflict dynamics.

name: Minezone Website
description: A full-stack website designed for a Mincraft server witih 300+ active players.

name: Analysis of School Attendance Data
description: An analysis of 2020-2021 Ontario school attendance data that displays trends across various student groups and districts.

name: Email Spam Detector
description: A simple uni-gram classifier fine-tuned to detect spam emails with high accuracy and low false positives.
